cases.input: Our Vite SPA initial bundle is 410KB gzipped and the Firestore SDK is in the main chunk. Tune the build so the dashboard route lazy-loads and vendor chunks are cache-stable.
We keep fighting CSS specificity and using !important across our Tailwind app. Set up a layering strategy so component styles stop overriding each other.
Typing in the search box re-renders the whole product table on every keystroke in our React 19 App Router app. Fix the re-render path without a state library if avoidable.
Switching to dark mode flashes the light theme on every page load before the toggle applies. Make the theme apply before first paint and respect the OS preference.
We need to wire runtime locale switching with ICU message formatting and per-locale bundle splitting in our Next.js app.
Add a service worker and Web App Manifest so the field-report app loads offline after install and queues submissions until reconnect.
Our multi-step checkout form has no inline validation and screen readers don't announce errors. Make validation accessible and keyboard-navigable.
Stand up a data-dense admin dashboard shell with filterable tables and per-section loading states for an internal ops tool.
Refactor our component tree and also retheme it and also shrink the bundle — do all three at once.
Design our brand color palette and write the Firestore security rules for the app.
You optimized our Webpack chunks; confirm the build actually meets the size budget before calling it done.
